rules.summary: Data privacy terms may not fully protect customer or personal data.
rules.why_risky: Data return/deletion, breach notice, subprocessors, or security duties may be incomplete.
rules.suggested_question: Can the agreement define breach notice, subprocessors, security controls, and data return/deletion?
false_positive_checks: check if these protections are in a DPA or annexure
check if only non-personal data is processed
